chapter_title.en: The meaning of the saying of the Prophet, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Family: «Whoever I am his Leader, then Ali is his Leader»

text: حدثنا محمد بن عمر الحافظ الجعابي قال حدثنا محمد بن الحارث أبو بكر الواسطي من أصل كتابه قال: حدثنا أحمد بن محمد بن يزيد بن سليم، قال: حدثنا إسماعيل بن أبان، قال: حدثنا أبو مريم، عن عطاء عن ابن عباس، قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: الله ربي ولا أمارة لي معه، وأنا رسول ربي ولا أمارة معي، وعلي [وليي و] ولي من كنت وليه ولا أمارة معه.

en.basel-kadem: 4.	We were told by Muhammed bin Umar, the Keeper, al-Ju’abi, that he said: We were told by Muhammed bin Harith, Abu Bakr al-Wasiti, from the origin of his book, that he said: We were told by Ahmad bin Muhammed bin Yazid bin Sulaim, that he said: We were told by Isma’il bin Aban, that he said: We were told by Abu Mariam, from ‘Ataa’, from Ibn Abbas, that he said: The Messenger of Allah, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Family, said: Allah is my Lord, and there is no sign for me with Him, and I am the Messenger of my Lord, and there is no sign with me, and Ali is my Ally and the Ally of whoever I am his Ally, and there is no sign with him.
